children.name: Tripedalia
children.description: Tripedalia — a genus of tripedaliid box jellyfish in the family Tripedaliidae.

children.name: Tripedalia binata
children.description: Tripedalia binata — a species in the genus Tripedalia, family Tripedaliidae. Also known as tripedaliid box jellyfish.

children.name: Tripedalia cystophora
children.description: Tripedalia cystophora is a small species of box jellyfish in the family Tripedaliidae..

children.name: Tripedalia maipoensis
children.description: Tripedalia maipoensis — a species in the genus Tripedalia, family Tripedaliidae. Also known as tripedaliid box jellyfish.

children.name: Copula
children.description: Copula — a genus of tripedaliid box jellyfish in the family Tripedaliidae.

children.name: Copula sivickisi
children.description: Copula is a monotypic genus of box jellyfish in the family Tripedaliidae of the phylum Cnidaria..
